subject: feat(deploy): replace GitHub Actions/Pages with Vercel deployment
body:
GitHub Pages required a /sun-sea-o/ base path and a 404.html workaround
for SPA routing. Vercel serves at root with proper rewrites, simplifying
configuration and eliminating the GitHub Pages source setting gotcha.

- Remove .github/workflows/deploy.yml
- Add vercel.json with SPA rewrites and Vite framework config
- Remove base: '/sun-sea-o/' from vite.config.ts (Vercel serves at /)
- Update PWA manifest paths and favicon href to root-relative
- Update CLAUDE.md, README.md, docs/USER_ACTIONS.md

Tags: deployment, vercel, infrastructure, pwa
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: deployment
